MaxDirection.description: The direction, in degrees(°) clockwise from north that the maximum incoming solar radiation is coming from.

MinDirection.description: The direction, in degrees(°) clockwise from north that the minimum incoming solar radiation is coming from.

MaxTilt.description: The angle, in degrees(°) above the horizon that the maximum incoming solar radiation is coming from.

MinTilt.description: The angle, in degrees(°) above the horizon that the minimum incoming solar radiation is coming from.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
